name: Blue Star Foods Corp.
business: Blue Star Foods Corp. imports, packages, and sells refrigerated pasteurized crab meat and other premium seafood products. It sources crab meat primarily from Southeast Asia and distributes in the United States and Canada. Through its subsidiary Taste of BC Aquafarms, it also produces steelhead salmon and rainbow trout fingerlings using land-based recirculating aquaculture systems.

exposures.sentence: TOBC is a land-based recirculating aquaculture system (RAS) farming operation located in Nanaimo, British Columbia, Canada with an annual production capacity of approximately 100 tons.

We distribute our imported blue and red swimming crabmeat in the United States under the brand names Blue Star, Pacifika, Oceanica, Crab & Go Premium Seafood, First Choice, Good Stuff and Coastal Pride Fresh and steelhead salmon and rainbow trout fingerlings produced by TOBC under the brand name Little Cedar Falls.

catalysts.event: Reach production of 21,000 metric tons of steelhead salmon
catalysts.sentence: We have an internal goal to reach production of 21,000 metric tons of steelhead salmon by 2028.

tamClaims.claim: Per capita food fish consumption grew from 9.0 kg in the 1960s to 20.2 kg in 2020.
tamClaims.sentence: Per capita food fish consumption grew from 9.0 kg (live weight equivalent) in the 1960s to 20.2 kg in 2020, at an average annual rate of 3% compared with a population growth rate of 1.6% (2).

tamClaims.claim: Total production of aquatic animals is expected to reach 202 million tons in 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: Total production of aquatic animals is expected to reach 202 million tons in 2030, mainly due to sustained growth of aquaculture, projected to reach 100 million tons for the first time in 2027 and 106 million tons in 2030 (5).
